notes: 3.10.07 (nen 3.10.06): Mobile Approval PA1 — trang 'Duyet nhanh' mobile-first liet ke phieu AP 'cho toi xu ly', cham -> openPayableModal() (xem chung tu + Duyet/Tu choi bang nut san co). Chi 1 VIEW cua AP: tai dung 100% workflow/permission/audit/modal, KHONG module/backend/logic nghiep vu moi. Loc bang pure helper apPendingForMe() (to hop primitive wfStatus+canCheckAcc/L1/L2+payables, SOD an phieu minh tao). KT thay pending_acc, L1 thay pending_l1, L2 thay pending_l2, admin xem tat ca + chuyen vai. Sau flag FLAG_MOBILE_APPROVAL. Khong dung trang Phe duyet (07) hien co.
